data.body: acaf held-out validation: restored full oracle after implementation; 23 focused tests pass including manifest parser failures, legacy byte identity, canonical/archived/dual-role relation collection, strict clean tracker HEAD, invalid-path no-leak behavior, and ordinary/refresh/re-sign wiring. Defect-seeded mutation removing pin emission made the held-out manifest test fail, then production was restored. Refactoring litmus: assertions target manifest bytes, snapshot values, stable error reasons, and signing outputs rather than private call layout.
